errors_encountered.detail: Graph API TooManyRequests (throttle.aad.ags.50RPM), retryAfterSeconds=60 — waited out inline via Monitor cooldown loop, then retried successfully
Graph API TooManyRequests (throttle.aad.ags.50RPM), retryAfterSeconds=60 — waited out inline, then retried successfully

Folder lookup returned NOT_FOUND twice despite OC3PL being a real, populated direct Inbox subfolder (575 messages, confirmed via read_resource mail:///folders/). Treated as a lookup mismatch per the fix note, not proof of absence — compensated with sender-domain search (oc3pl.com), which is folder-agnostic and successfully surfaced this week's OC3PL activity.

Folder lookup returned NOT_FOUND twice despite Pedrero Regulatory being a real, populated folder (56 messages, confirmed via read_resource mail:///folders/). Compensated with sender-domain search (pedreroregulatory.com) covering the full week — returned zero messages, a genuine clean result for this window, not a skipped check.

Same lookup-mismatch pattern; FWS exists as a subfolder under OC3PL (1803 messages). Not separately re-swept by folder name since OC3PL sender-domain coverage and the FWS-domain outbound thread found in Sent Items already surfaced this week's FWS activity.

Actual folder name per read_resource listing is 'Logiwa Daily Shipment Report' (118 messages) — the name in SKILL.md's topic-folder list doesn't exactly match the live folder name. Not re-swept this run since no Logiwa-specific PLM-bound content was in scope for this week's report; noting the name drift for the skill reference.

verification_notes.netsuite_removed: confirmed — no NetSuite sender/domain search attempted at any point in this run; Flow I invoice recognition only exercised Ramp-path and direct-vendor-path logic
verification_notes.oc3pl_folder_recognition: confirmed folder exists as a direct Inbox child (not nested); NOT_FOUND lookup treated as a tool-side mismatch and compensated via sender-domain sweep rather than abandoned
verification_notes.pedrero_folder_sweep: attempted via folderName (NOT_FOUND, same mismatch pattern) and backstopped via sender-domain search (pedreroregulatory.com) for the full week window — returned zero results, a clean read for this period
verification_notes.hct_thread_read_to_end: read full thread body (not just latest-message summary) for 'Lip Treatment Color match samples - Tube & UC'; confirmed proofs for Jamaican Cherry/Fig/Sorrel and Guava/Essential were already signed and returned earlier in the thread, and the most recent message (7/17) has moved on to tube-ready-date scheduling — not flagged as a pending signature item
